articles.title: Binance withdraws Greece-filed MiCA application.
articles.description: Binance said it plans to seek authorization in another EU jurisdiction just days ahead of the July 1 MiCA deadline, as unlicensed crypto firms are expected to wind down activities in the bloc.

articles.title: This new tracking label could help solve cargo theft
articles.description: The Samsara Tracking Label hides a BLE system that can offering real-time location in a disposable package.

articles.title: OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom
articles.description: Named Jalapeño, the new processor was designed specifically for the unique needs of OpenAI's inference systems.

articles.title: Bitcoin just broke below the floor of its famous Rainbow Chart into the ‘BTC is dead’ zone
articles.description: A 50% drop from recent highs has pushed the asset into a zone historically labeled as a dead end, sparking a debate among crypto analysts.

articles.title: The banking lobby is wrong about stablecoins and community banks
articles.description: Congress should not kneecap one of the clearest advances in payment infrastructure to protect community banks from a threat that has not been proven, argues Eco CEO Ryne Saxe.

articles.title: How memecoin marketing moved from online speculation to real-world risk
articles.description: From alcohol dares to head-shaving challenges, memecoin campaigns are turning engagement into exploitation.

articles.title: DeFi TVL drops 39% in 2026 amid market downturn and record hack activity
articles.description: DeFi TVL fell 39% in 2026 as a broader market downturn and fallout from major exploits, including the Kelp DAO hack, weighed on the sector.

articles.title: Valor Equity Partners looks to raise a $2.5B Fund VII, per Bloomberg
articles.description: New details have emerged about Valor's latest fund, which last year announced it was raising an unspecified amount of capital.

articles.description: Precious metals have fallen sharply from their 2025 highs as markets price in Fed rate hikes.

articles.title: Bitcoin could fall to $55,000 before finding a bottom, 10x Research says
articles.description: A strengthening U.S. dollar and the Fed's hawkish turn under new chair Kevin Warsh may keep pressure on crypto through the summer.

articles.title: Aave could soar to $3,500 by 2030 on DeFi revival, says StanChart
articles.description: Geoff Kendrick said Aave has moved past April's cyberattack-related market disruption and is well positioned to benefit from growth in tokenized assets and DeFi.

articles.title: SecondFi traces Cardano wallet exploit to address-level issue
articles.description: Cardano wallet SecondFi traced the incident to an address-level issue and secured 129 million ADA after attackers drained funds from 374 addresses.

articles.title: Slate Auto’s radically simple electric truck starts at $24,950
articles.description: The Jeff Bezos-backed startup finally revealed more pricing details for its debut EV, including a $29,950 starting price for the SUV variant, and boosted the base range to 205 miles.
